case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUCIA MARICELA RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED SEP-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LUCIA MARICELA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCIA MARICELA RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LUCIA MARICELA $1,791.56 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,891.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,791.56 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, LUCIA MARICELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
